title: Type Safe Config

statement.markdown:
## Problem Statement
We need to create a configuration system that is safe against incorrect usage and easy to extend.

### Requirements
1. Create a class `Config` that accepts an object of type `ConfigData`.

2. Implement type safety by using the `ConfigData` type to validate the provided configuration.
3. Allow extension of the configuration by adding new fields to `ConfigData`.
4. Use TypeScript's built-in features to ensure the correctness of the configuration.

constraints: No external dependencies other than TypeScript's built-in functionality can be used.
The configuration must be validated at runtime.
Any changes to `ConfigData` should not affect existing code.

gradingCriteria.description: Config class constructor validates the provided configuration.
Config class allows extension of the configuration.
Config class correctly implements type safety.
